CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-03-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-07-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendant, And Request For Sanctions (Motions)
Off Calendar Jan-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Maxwell Kreymer, Esq. 310-552-2250 Knight Law Group for Plaintiff.
Arash Yaraghchian, Esq. 949-777-6032 ErskineLaw for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court announces the contest email was received late. Mr. Kreymer aplogizes and informs the Court he has found Judge Pro Tem Lebowitz's report and recommendation. Both sides argue. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAGOBERTO AMADOR, MARIA OJEDA's Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendant, And Request For Sanctions.

Plaintiffs' discovery motion is granted in part and denied in part as articulated in the judge pro tem's report and recommendation, which is adopted.

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim to the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and must attach the Judge Pro Tem's report and recommendation
